query:
-- Step 1: Delete all open and closed positions
DELETE FROM paperPositions;

-- Step 2: Delete all trade history
DELETE FROM paperTrades;

-- Step 3: Delete all equity snapshots
DELETE FROM paperEquitySnapshots;

-- Step 4: Reset the ledger to $100,000 clean slate
UPDATE paperLedger
SET availableCash = 100000.00,
    totalDeposited = 100000.00,
    totalWithdrawn = 0.00,
    realizedPnl = 0.00,
    totalCommissions = 0.00,
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id > 0;

-- Step 5: Verify the reset
SELECT id, userId, availableCash, totalDeposited, realizedPnl, totalCommissions FROM paperLedger LIMIT 5;
